zh.lifeSummary: 當Hamo Princerna Valngnes  Rie於1070年出生在英國素福爾可帕哈姆時，他的父親Peter Piers De Valognes22歲，母親Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur18歲。他和Agnes FitzJohn至少有1個女兒。他去世於1147年在英國薩默塞特享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hamo Princerna Valngnes  Rie于1070年出生在英国素福爾可帕哈姆时，他的父亲Peter Piers De Valognes22岁，母亲Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur18岁。他和Agnes FitzJohn至少有1个女儿。他去世于1147年在英国薩默塞特享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Rie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: topographic name for someone who lived beside a road, track, or pathway, Old French rue (from Latin ruga ‘crease, fold’).
Shortened form of American French   Larue   2, itself an altered form of French   Leroux  .

English: from Middle English rew (Old English rāw) ‘row’. The surname may be topographic, signifying someone who lived by a hedgerow or in a row of houses in a street, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Rewe (Devon), Rew Farm in Rockbeare (Devon), and Rew in Malborough (Devon). See also Rawe 1 and Rowe .

variants.name: Larue
meanings: French: topographic name for someone who lived beside a road, track, or pathway, Old French rue (see Rue ), with fused feminine definite article la; or a habitational name from La Rue, the name of several places in various parts of France, of the same origin. Compare Delarue .
Altered form of French   Leroux  . Compare   Rue   2.

History: This surname (see 2 above) is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (in the form La Rue, along with the variant Larew and the original form Le Roux) and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Ruen
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from a farm so named, among others in Hadeland, from Old Norse ruth ‘clearing’. Compare Rue .
German: variant of Ruhn, from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name such as Ruomald. The surname Ruen is virtually non-existing in Germany.
Possibly also an altered form of German Rühen, a shortened form of Rüden (see Ruden ). The surname Rühen is very rare in Germany.

nameMeanings.name: Hamo
meanings: This is still found as a male baptismal name. It is derived from Hamo, who came over with the Conqueror; perhaps from the Icelandic hamr, a skin found in ulf-hamr, the nickname of a mythological king, which Cleasby translates 'wolf-skin.'

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Hamo Princerna Valngnes  Rie was born in 1070, in Parham, Suffolk, England, his father, Peter Piers De Valognes, was 22 and his mother, Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur, was 18. He had at least 1 daughter with Agnes FitzJohn. He died in 1147, in Somerset, England, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hamo Princerna Valngnes  Rie est né en 1070, à Parham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Peter Piers De Valognes, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Agnes FitzJohn. Il est décédé en 1147, à Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hamo Princerna Valngnes  Rie 1070 in Parham, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Peter Piers De Valognes 22 und seine Mutter Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur 18. Er hatte mit Agnes FitzJohn mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1147 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Somerset, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hamo Princerna Valngnes  Rie è nato il nel 1070 nel Parham, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Peter Piers De Valognes, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur, aveva 18 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Agnes FitzJohn. Morì nel 1147, nel Somerset, England, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hamo Princerna Valngnes  Rieが1070年にイギリススフォルクパーハムで生まれた時，父Peter Piers De Valognesは22歳，母Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveurは18歳であった。彼はAgnes FitzJohnとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1147年にイギリスソメルセトで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hamo Princerna Valngnes  Rie(이)가 1070년 영국 수폴크 파람에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Peter Piers De Valognes(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Agnes FitzJohn(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1147년 영국 서머세트에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hamo Princerna Valngnes  Rie nasceu em 1070, em Parham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Peter Piers De Valognes, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur, tinha 18 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Agnes FitzJohn. Ele faleceu em 1147, em Somerset, Inglaterra, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hamo Princerna Valngnes  Rie родился в 1070 г. в местности парам, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Peter Piers De Valognes было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur, 18. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Agnes FitzJohn. Он умер в 1147 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hamo Princerna Valngnes  Rie nació en 1070, en Parham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Peter Piers De Valognes, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Albreda De Ries Saint Sauveur, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Agnes FitzJohn. Murió en 1147, en Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 77 años.
